about: Design recipe ledger for all mockups. Newest entries FIRST. Before building any mockup: run `node ledger-check.js` (or read the last 10 entries) — any displayFont, paletteFamily, or loaderConcept used in the last 10 entries is OFF the table for the new build. After building: append the new entry in the same commit as the mockup. Backfilled entries (pre 2026-06-09) have null block codes because the data wasn't recorded at build time.

entries.flourish: water-fill loader (Revamp wordmark) + brass hairline frame
entries.seed: SEED - Revamp Property Services, Devon (kitchen & bathroom specialists; owner Lee Potts; new prospect, 07378110191, WhatsApp-only mobile, no email). DELIBERATE CLONE of the mastercraft-bathrooms mockup at the client's explicit request ('do it like mastercraft bathrooms one but include english kitchen stock images too' + follow-up 'dont worry about being distinct - make it like mastercraft'). Cooldown intentionally OVERRIDDEN per that instruction: Outfit display font, dark-bronze+gold palette and the water-fill loader are all currently in the 12-window but were reused verbatim because the brief is to match mastercraft, not differentiate. Same dark warm-black #14120f + brass #c8a05a/#e3c386 surface, Outfit 300/Inter body, water-fill brand reveal loader, hero-frame, numbered 2-col services, mosaic gallery, feature/about, CTA band, 3-col reviews, area chips, split contact. CHANGES vs mastercraft: positioned for BOTH kitchens and bathrooms - hero is a dark/brass fitted kitchen, gallery interleaves 3 English kitchens (Pexels 13722883/13722854/13722898 - dark brass-lit fitted kitchens, marble islands, no people, visually inspected; rejected 18285887 for a wall-mounted AC split unit reading non-UK) with 3 reused mastercraft luxury bathrooms (copper walk-in, dark marble en-suite, Calacatta freestanding); craft.jpg (brass tap) + band.jpg (marble bath) reused from mastercraft. Services rebalanced to kitchens+bathrooms (fitted kitchens, worktops & cabinetry, full bathrooms, wet rooms, en-suites, tiling, K&B design, plumbing). Devon areas (Exeter/Plymouth/Torquay/Newton Abbot/Exmouth/Tiverton + more). NO fabricated stats: dropped mastercraft's '25 years/600+ bathrooms' - hero badge is 'Free / Design visit & quote', feature stats are '2 trades one team / 1 point of contact / Free design & quote'. CTAs are 'Call us' NOT 'Call Lee' (owner-name CTA rule - name only appears in About + reviews). GA removed (prospect mockup, no tracking). Phone base64-obfuscated, WhatsApp 447378110191. Blocks: hero:H2 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G3 / about+stats(LP) / band / reviews:R3 (5.0 local) / areas / contact:C1. FLAGS for the user: confirm base town within Devon (areas listed generically), confirm trading years before adding any year/number stat, confirm an email address (none supplied so contact is phone/WhatsApp/form only).

entries.flourish: Setting Out loader (NEW, added to loader-lab) + architect dimension-line dividers
entries.seed:
SEED - BrentBarker Construction, Oxford (general builder, brand-new partnership)
Palette: cool pale stone #f4f4f1 + white cards, Oxford-blue ink/brand #0e2747 (nav/footer/dark bands), restrained Oxford-stone ochre accent #b8843f - heritage Oxford pairing, deliberately away from the saturated brick-red/terracotta cluster (sm-builders/gd-brickwork/expert-tiling)
Type: Hanken Grotesk 700-900 display / Inter body / JetBrains Mono micro-labels - cleared the 10-window
Signature: Setting Out loader (NEW, added to loader-lab) - a builder plot/footprint draws itself in ochre on a navy blueprint, profile pegs snap into the corners, dimension ticks fire, wordmark stamps the plot. Echoed site-wide as architect dimension-line dividers (hairline + end-ticks + a small mono measurement)
Texture: setting-out / surveying language - dimension lines, plot footprint, profile pegs
Loader: setting out (NEW concept, deliberately NOT brick coursework - that cluster is saturated)
Voice: all word-of-mouth -> reviews are local recommendations (R3, no Google G); two partners so CTAs are Call us (Charles named only in the about, not in CTAs); no email supplied so contact is phone/WhatsApp/form
Ledger ok: Hanken Grotesk, stone+oxford-blue+ochre, setting-out loader, and H1+S4+G2 all clear of the last 10
Blocks: hero:H1 / services:S4 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R3 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: spirit-level loader (loader-lab #13, pine-green) revealing the client's REAL logo + datum-line divider
entries.seed: SEED - J T Green General Builders & Resin Bound Installers, Somerton, Somerset (TA11; owner Justin Green, FMB approved 7yrs, fully insured £10m, 17 years in the trade). General builder: extensions (his speciality), renovations, new builds, groundworks, bricklaying & stonework, resin bound driveways, block paving/patios, kitchens & bathrooms. Moving to Devon later, kept Somerset-focused for now. Real details pulled from jtgreenbuilders.co.uk + FMB/Facebook (the .com in the brief was dead). Stock photos only, English, NO people - visually inspected every image; rejected continental hollow-block builds, US kitchen (range+toaster-oven+AC vent), South-Africa barred-window kitchen, dated blue continental bathroom. Archetype C Photo-led Premium but LIGHT surface (cool stone/white, charcoal ink #16201c, big photos) per bright-default rule. Palette: single deep pine-green accent #1f5e3f straight off the GREEN surname as the brand hook, on cool-stone white; warm sand #b08249 micro-accent only for the spirit-level bubble. Family cool-stone+pine-green, distinct from banned white+verde-green+chilli-red (single green, no second chilli colour). Type: Hanken Grotesk 700-900 display (0 ledger uses) + Inter body; no mono editorial labels, no italics. Signature: Spirit Level loader from loader-lab (#13 builder/general trades, NOT in cooldown), recoloured pine-green, bubble settles to centre then JT GREEN wordmark; datum-line hairline section divider + nav brand mark both echo the level baseline. Voice: Call/WhatsApp Justin (name public in reviews), FMB front and centre, resin bound surfaced as differentiator (it is in the business name), no invented 24/7. Ledger ok: Hanken Grotesk never used; cool-stone+pine-green new family; spirit level loader clears cooldown; combo H1+S4+G2 clears banned list. Blocks: hero:H1 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G2 / about+T3 founder(JG) / reviews:R3 (2x2 local Somerset, no Google G - no confirmed rating) / areas(Somerton first) / cta band / contact:C1. UPDATE (same session, per client feedback): swapped ALL stock for the client's OWN real photos (pulled 28+ work shots + logo from jtgreenbuilders.co.uk; chose 8 covering bifold/brick/rendered/stone extensions, garden room, resin drives, rooflights; avoided 2 shots containing a worker) and his REAL green+red JTGreen logo in nav/loader/footer (white chip on dark footer); added Loft Conversions service + New Builds emphasis per his services page; hero CTAs shortened to 'Call us'/'WhatsApp' (Justin retained elsewhere) to de-bulk mobile.

entries.flourish: ignition trade loader + floating orange blob fields
